events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes orange cable handling violations in a high-voltage automotive context. Orange cables are HV interconnection cables in EVs. Handling violations could mean improper routing, lack of strain relief, damaged insulation, improper connectors, etc. This is a safety non-compliance. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: non-compliant, possibly installed-defective. Percent complete: maybe 70. Confidence high.
